name: Tex-Mex Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Pan fry ground beef until light brown in a skillet.
3. Drain fat from the skillet.
4. Add onions and peppers to the skillet and cook until onions are tender.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
6. Heat mixture until warm.
7. Pour into a casserole dish, cover with foil, and bake for 1 hour.
